---
title: "WRDS - Revelio"
page-layout: article
---

# WRDS - Revelio

**Provider:** WRDS

## Description

Workforce analytics dataset covering job postings, employee work histories, reviews, and workforce dynamics. Supports labor market, human capital, and organizational research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Workforce & Career Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Individual Account Required
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Workforce & Career Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

An individual WRDS account is required to access this data.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/pages/get-data/revelio-labs/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
